main_event: 16-year-old in Dayton observed saucer-shaped object with alternating red and green blinking lights for 25 seconds on 6 December 1968.
sighted_object: saucer shaped, solid, glowed (pulsating light); 2 lights Green & Red one at each end, switched colors every 2 seconds
witness_description: civilian male age 16, outdoors walking through friend's house at Lanthrop & Sted Ave, taking flying lessons
interesting_points: Object described as saucer shaped, solid, glowing with pulsating light
Two lights Green & Red one at each end; lights switched respective colors every 2 seconds
Larger than matchhead at arm's length
Disappeared by going up and shot away
Observer estimated speed 1 m per sec, distance 1 mile
Observer had seen similar phenomenon before: March 67, Wayne Ave, east side, 3 objects landing
